_comment: Canonical AI vocabulary. Edit this file to add/rename tags. Python reads this at import; the TS types in frontend/src/types/ai-vocab.generated.ts are emitted from this by scraper/emit_ts_vocab.py — run it after any change (or CI will fail). See ADR-012.

aiTags.label: Paved Access
aiTags.description: Reachable by paved road year-round.

aiTags.label: Seasonal Access
aiTags.description: Road in/out is blocked or impassable part of the year (snow, mud, gates).

aiTags.label: Remote Access
aiTags.description: Access route is rough, long, or depends on private easements.

aiTags.label: Utilities On-Site
aiTags.description: At least one of power/water/septic is already installed.

aiTags.label: Off-Grid Viable
aiTags.description: Plausibly livable without connection to public grid (solar + well + septic).

aiTags.label: Infrastructure Needed
aiTags.description: Requires major infrastructure work (road, well, septic, power) before occupancy.

aiTags.label: Water Rights
aiTags.description: Listing explicitly mentions recorded water rights or shares.

aiTags.label: Year-Round Water
aiTags.description: Creek, spring, or well flows reliably through all seasons.

aiTags.label: Seasonal Water
aiTags.description: Surface water present only part of the year.

aiTags.label: No Water Mentioned
aiTags.description: Description makes no mention of water — likely absent or unknown.

aiTags.label: Build-Ready
aiTags.description: Surveyed, percolation-tested, access cleared — ready to pour a foundation.

aiTags.label: Buildable w/ Work
aiTags.description: Buildable after some clearing, permit work, or grading.

aiTags.label: Difficult Terrain
aiTags.description: Steep, rocky, or otherwise hard to develop.

aiTags.label: Good Ag Soil
aiTags.description: Soil description supports growing food or pasture.

aiTags.label: Remote Living
aiTags.description: Realistic as a full-time residence despite distance from services.

aiTags.label: Near Services
aiTags.description: Close to town, grocery, and emergency services.

aiTags.label: Isolated
aiTags.description: Meaningfully far from neighbors or services — privacy / self-reliance oriented.

aiTags.label: Agriculture
aiTags.description: Suitable for crops, livestock, or market gardening.

aiTags.label: Timber
aiTags.description: Standing merchantable timber mentioned.

aiTags.label: Hunting
aiTags.description: Wildlife and habitat described; realistic for game hunting.

aiTags.label: Grazing
aiTags.description: Pasture or range land suitable for livestock grazing.

aiTags.label: No HOA
aiTags.description: Explicitly no HOA, covenants, or deed restrictions.

aiTags.label: HOA Present
aiTags.description: HOA mentioned — dues and rules apply.

aiTags.label: Deed Restrictions
aiTags.description: Covenants or deed restrictions mentioned (may limit use).

aiTags.label: Zoning Issues
aiTags.description: Zoning is unusual, changing, or may limit intended use.

aiTags.label: Flood Risk
aiTags.description: Floodplain, seasonal flooding, or proximity to waterway mentioned as a concern.

aiTags.label: Fire Risk
aiTags.description: Wildfire exposure mentioned — high-risk zone or recent burn history.

aiTags.label: Mineral Rights Excluded
aiTags.description: Subsurface/mineral rights are NOT included in the sale.

redFlags.label: HOA Restrictions
redFlags.description: Active HOA limits construction, livestock, or other homesteading activity.

redFlags.label: Flood Zone
redFlags.description: Property falls in a flood zone or has flood history.

redFlags.label: Wetland
redFlags.description: Wetland designation restricts building or land alteration.

redFlags.label: No Water Source
redFlags.description: No well, creek, or spring — critical infrastructure gap.

redFlags.label: No Road Access
redFlags.description: Legal or physical access to the parcel is unclear or absent.

redFlags.label: Easement Concerns
redFlags.description: Third-party easements or right-of-way issues across the parcel.

redFlags.label: Environmental Hazard
redFlags.description: Known contamination, mine tailings, toxic soil, etc.

redFlags.label: Title Issues
redFlags.description: Unresolved liens, quiet-title action, or clouded deed.

redFlags.label: Tax Sale Risk
redFlags.description: Tax-sale or foreclosure property — redemption risk, title not guaranteed.

redFlags.label: Needs Septic
redFlags.description: No existing septic system — must be permitted and installed.

redFlags.label: Needs Well
redFlags.description: No existing well — drilling depth/yield unknown until attempted.

redFlags.label: Zoning: No Residential
redFlags.description: Current zoning does not allow a residence to be built.

redFlags.label: Extremely Remote
redFlags.description: Very far from services — suitable only for the self-sufficient-ready.

redFlags.label: Price Too Good
redFlags.description: Price is far below comparables — diligence strongly advised.
